title: Transcriptome of Nuciferine Treated Brown Adipocytes
author: Jiang, Mengxin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The file contains transcriptome data of brown adipocytes treated with nuciferine, either during differentation (8 days) or post-differentation (24 h), obtained through RNA sequncing using a Illumina platform. There are 3 samples in each group, designated as Ctrl_1, Ctrl_2, Ctrl_3; Pre_1, Pre_2, Pre_3; Post_1, Post_2, Post_3. Data were presented as FPKM to facilite further analysis.
steps_raw: The file contains transcriptome data of brown adipocytes treated with nuciferine, either during differentation (8 days) or post-differentation (24 h), obtained through RNA sequncing using a Illumina platform. There are 3 samples in each group, designated as Ctrl_1, Ctrl_2, Ctrl_3; Pre_1, Pre_2, Pre_3; Post_1, Post_2, Post_3. Data were presented as FPKM to facilite further analysis.
